title: Name, Not Total Origin
prompt: Separate al-Khwārizmī's role in the word history of algorithm from the broader history of procedural reasoning.

title: Algorism as Method
prompt: Show how Hindu-Arabic numerals, place value, zero, and written layout support calculation.

title: Algebra as Procedure
prompt: Trace unknown, root, square, number, case, rule, transformation, solution, and verification.

title: Precision Honors Legacy
prompt: Use precise verbs such as systematized, transmitted, explained, organized, and formalized.
